series_metadata.series_title: Ross/Now Solutions Payroll System Security Settings
series_metadata.series_description: Explanatory memoranda and grids of security data defining system user classes, the various screens/functions aligned to each class and the corresponding privileges (add, change, delete, inquire). Also includes, User Account Listing that details all active users and their respective class assignment.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until superseded ; Electronic: Retain until superseded, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
